name: VanEck Avalanche ETF
summary: VanEck Avalanche ETF (VAVX) is a Delaware statutory trust formed on March 10, 2025, that operates as a passive investment vehicle holding AVAX, the native token of the Avalanche blockchain network. The Trust issues shares listed on Nasdaq representing fractional ownership of AVAX holdings. It may also stake a portion of its AVAX to earn staking rewards. It is sponsored by VanEck Digital Assets, LLC and managed with custodians Anchorage Digital Bank N.A. and Coinbase Custody Trust Company, LLC.
